title: rubus teretiusculus
intro: Rubus teretiusculus, also known as the Japanese dewberry, is a type of flowering shrub native to Japan. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rubus teretiusculus include improving cardiovascular health, reducing blood pressure, and exhibiting antiviral and antibacterial properties. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
